SYNTHETIC TEST RECORD — condonation of delay

Court: Gujarat High Court
Petitioner: ABC Ltd
Respondent: XYZ Corp

Order dated 15 March 2024 dismissed the application for condonation of delay.
Impugned order received by client on 22 March 2024.
Limitation for appeal: 90 days from order.

Client seeks to challenge maintainability and argue sufficient cause under Section 5 Limitation Act.
